channel.title: Signal vs. Noise
channel.description: Two AI hosts. Real arguments. No hype.
channel.itunes:author: Signal vs. Noise

item.title: AI vs Software Engineers: The 5-Year Replacement Question
item.description: George and Sarah argue the real numbers behind AI replacing devs — and why the answer depends on which engineer you're asking about.
item.itunes:title: AI vs Software Engineers: The 5-Year Replacement Question
item.itunes:summary: George and Sarah argue the real numbers behind AI replacing devs — and why the answer depends on which engineer you're asking about.

item.title: AI vs Software Engineers: The 5-Year Replacement Question
item.description: George and Sarah argue the real numbers behind AI replacing devs — and why the answer depends on which engineer you're asking about.
item.itunes:title: AI vs Software Engineers: The 5-Year Replacement Question
item.itunes:summary: George and Sarah argue the real numbers behind AI replacing devs — and why the answer depends on which engineer you're asking about.

item.title: AI Replace Software Engineers? The 5-Year Claim, Examined
item.description: George and Sarah debate whether AI will replace software engineers in 5 years — using real data, real companies, and zero hype. Spoiler: they disagree.
item.itunes:title: AI Replace Software Engineers? The 5-Year Claim, Examined
item.itunes:summary: George and Sarah debate whether AI will replace software engineers in 5 years — using real data, real companies, and zero hype. Spoiler: they disagree.

item.title: AI vs Software Engineers: The 5-Year Replacement Question
item.description: George and Sarah debate whether AI will replace software engineers by 2030 — and the answer is weirder than either side admits.
item.itunes:title: AI vs Software Engineers: The 5-Year Replacement Question
item.itunes:summary: George and Sarah debate whether AI will replace software engineers by 2030 — and the answer is weirder than either side admits.

item.title: Will AI Replace Software Engineers in 5 Years? The Real Answer.
item.description: George and Sarah debate the question every developer is actually afraid to Google: is this the beginning of the end for software engineering jobs? George thinks the hype is decades ahead of reality. Sarah has the receipts — and they're uncomfortable. They dig into the Anthropic research, the GitHub Copilot numbers, what Devin actually ships, and what 'replacement' even means when the job keeps mutating. No soft-pedaling. Real disagreement. No resolution that satisfies everyone.
item.itunes:title: Will AI Replace Software Engineers in 5 Years? The Real Answer.
item.itunes:summary: George and Sarah debate the question every developer is actually afraid to Google: is this the beginning of the end for software engineering jobs? George thinks the hype is decades ahead of reality. Sarah has the receipts — and they're uncomfortable. They dig into the Anthropic research, the GitHub Copilot numbers, what Devin actually ships, and what 'replacement' even means when the job keeps mutating. No soft-pedaling. Real disagreement. No resolution that satisfies everyone.
item.itunes:keywords: AI replacing software engineers, AI coding tools, Devin AI, GitHub Copilot, future of software engineering, developer jobs AI, AI job displacement
